The '''Hex Bomber''', also known as a '''Sabaoth Hex Bomber''' or a '''Sabaoth Bomber''', was a bomber [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Characteristics==
Hex Bombers were slow and not very agile compared with [[Sabaoth starfighter]]s, but capable of carrying several kind of warheads including [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] or missiles and bombs modified to include deadly [[Hex missile|Hex warheads]]; weapons crafted on [[Nod Kartha]] loaded with the chemical [[Trihexalon]]. Hex Bombers were often sent into combat alongside larger [[Hex Deployer]]s, both vessels being escorted by Sabaoth fighters.

==History==
Several Hex Bomber squadrons were sent by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]] to destroy an island settlement on [[Maramere]], following Toth's pact with [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] a decade after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. The Bombers were destroyed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], with help from [[Reti]] and [[Sol Sixxa]]. Hex Bombers were also deployed during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], when Toth's Hex fleet launched an assault against the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] fighting on the planet's surface. Gallia was able to destroy the Deployers and Bombers along with their missiles before they breached the atmosphere of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
